model: M2: per-K2-arm intercept + pooled gap slope (predeclared)
eligibility: release transitions with finite mean gap_arm and pool_risk; phase label = judge_used[t]; unknown judge labels are SKIPPED and reported
baseline: same intercepts, gap term zeroed (matched no-gap model)
blindness: kernel A + Modal branch-A partials (to r7) inspected pre-freeze; kernel B and Modal finals not inspected
